docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE BASED ON PROGRESS REPORT OF 4/25/14. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,958.34 FILED BY BRAVO & MARGULIES AS TO DEFENDANT O'NEILL, MAUREEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-25-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-25-2014 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAY-29-2014 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. CASE SETTLED.PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY JEFF MARGULIES--ATTORNEY EMPLOYEE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO SERVICE FEE) SERVED MAR-30-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT O'NEILL, MAUREEN
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRAVO & MARGULIES
